channel.title: Tech on Qian
channel.description: Recent content in Tech on Qian

item.title: How to print at NUS SoC
item.description: Adding printer to my mac is so hard. After trying it for 30 mins, I gave up. Then I searched on the Internet and got this tutorial. # Login to Sunfire ssh e0123456@sunfire.comp.nus.edu.sg # Copy a local file to Sunfire scp some_file.txt e0123456@sunfire.comp.nus.edu.sg:/home/e/e0123456/ # Copy a local directory to Sunfire scp -r ./some_directory e0123456@sunfire.comp.nus.edu.sg:/home/e/e0123456/ # Convert PDF to PS file pdftops input.pdf # Print via Sunfire, use printer pstsb, also can use psts and pstsc lpr -Ppstsb input.ps # Convert PS file to 2 pages per sheet psnup -2up input.ps output.ps refer to Aaron Choo's post
